response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel source modification, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like real-time applications
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical education initiatives
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX kernel contexts
No demonstrated knowledge of LAN-switch security protocols or embedded networking
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement

key_factors.factor: Absence of security protocol implementation experience
